meta.name: Navigo Systematic Trend
meta.descriptor: Systematic breadth- and trend-driven global ETF rotation

A.name: US Sector Breadth
A.desc: US sector top-K breadth rotation (K=7); rotates into the strongest S&P 500 sectors by share of constituents above their 200-day moving average.

B.name: Cross-Asset Trend
B.desc: Cross-asset trend rotation; holds the broad-market, regional and commodity sleeves that are above their 200-day moving average.

C.name: Thematic Momentum
C.desc: Thematic momentum rotation across cyber, clean energy, solar, battery and China-semiconductor baskets.

D.name: Europe Sector Breadth
D.desc: Europe (Stoxx 600) sector breadth rotation, mirroring sleeve A on the European sector universe.

TILT.name: EM Tilt
TILT.desc: EEM/SPY golden-cross tilt of 10% NAV, funded from sleeve B. Weak-evidence positional bet, not robust alpha.

labels.model: DEPLOYED · blend_35_35_10_20 with breadth gate + EEM tilt (Phase 19 + 22: golden cross V2, 10% funded from strategy_b)
labels.gate_only: REFERENCE · blend_35_35_10_20 with breadth gate only (Phase 19, no EEM tilt)
labels.ungated: 35% A + 35% B + 10% C + 20% D (Phase 4 ungated reference — overlay disabled)

attribution.note: Sleeve contribution = sleeve allocation x sleeve return (approximate; residual is overlay/tilt/rebalance). ETF contribution uses current weight.
